question: Based on the percentages shown next to each point in the chart, which statement is supported by the data?

options.A: Jewelry has the highest percentage among all the categories.
options.B: Clothing has the highest percentage among all the categories.
options.C: Flowers have a higher percentage than Jewelry.
options.D: Cards and Dining Out have the same percentage.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
